title: Atmos Energy (ATO) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Atmos Energy (ATO) have what it takes?

title: 4 Gas Distribution Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: The near-term prospects of the Zacks Gas Distribution industry look challenging. Yet, systematic investment to strengthen infrastructure and efficiently supply natural gas to customers should drive the performance of SRE, ATO NJR and NWN.

title: Atmos Energy: Strong Fundamentals, Improving Valuation Make This Utility A Buy
text: Atmos Energy Corporation is one of the largest natural gas utilities in the United States. The company enjoys stable cash flows and has grown its earnings per share for nineteen consecutive years.

title: Atmos Energy: This Strong, Texas Gas Utility Is A Buy At The Right Price
text: ATO is a high-quality Texas gas utility as well as a Dividend Aristocrat with 39 consecutive years of dividend growth. The company has plenty of capex available to grow its rate base over time.

title: These Were the 5 Best and Worst Performing Utilities Stocks in November 2022
text: Investing in utilities stocks is among the best low-risk and long-term investments.
